topic: working backwards with reciprocals and algebraic reasoning
latex:
Beginning with an integer $n$, Jake goes through the following steps:
\begin{itemize}
\item 1. Take the reciprocal of the starting number.
\item 2. Double the number obtained in Step 1.
\item 3. Take the reciprocal of the number obtained in Step 2.
\end{itemize}
At the end of the third step, Jake ends up with the number 16. What number did Jake start with?
